top_findings.title: At least 20 sample questions can be answered
top_findings.evidence: Server implements 6 tools (search_matches, get_team_statistics, get_head_to_head, search_players, get_competition_standings, get_match_statistics) supporting multiple question types; tests validate specific queries
top_findings.suggestion: Code appears capable of answering 20+ sample questions but no formal validation of 20 distinct question examples

top_findings.title: Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted
top_findings.evidence: data_loader.py:1-3 has unsorted imports (os, pandas, pathlib)
top_findings.suggestion: Use `ruff check --fix` or manually organize imports

top_findings.title: Unused import: os
top_findings.evidence: data_loader.py:1 imports os but never uses it

top_findings.title: Line too long (multiple instances)
top_findings.evidence: data_loader.py:50, 64, 78, 92, 116, 163, 169 exceed 88-char limit (44 total lint errors found)
top_findings.suggestion: Run `ruff check --fix` to auto-fix 17 fixable errors

top_findings.title: Search and return match data from all CSV files
top_findings.evidence: data_loader.py:39-78 defines load functions for all 5 match datasets (Brasileirao, Copa do Brasil, Libertadores, BR-Football, Historical); server.py:27-51 implements search_matches tool
